diagrams.title: Hierarchy of Environmental Laws in India
diagrams.description: Shows the structure from international agreements to constitutional provisions to specific laws
elements: Specific Laws (Water Act, Air Act, Forest Act, Wildlife Act)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the legal framework and how environmental laws are structured in India

diagrams.title: E-waste Management Flow under EPR
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how E-waste is managed under Extended Producer Responsibility
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the circular economy approach in E-waste management and producer responsibilities

diagrams.title: Pollution Control Board Structure
diagrams.description: Organizational structure showing CPCB and SPCB hierarchy and their functions
elements: Functions: Monitoring, Enforcement, Standard Setting, Advisory Role
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the institutional framework for pollution control in India
